Title: How to Retrieve Authorization Data for Card Payments
Content:
To retrieve authorization data (e.g., authorization_code, reconciliation_id, network_transaction_id, merchant_advice_code) for a card payment made via our v3 APIs, you have two options:

Option 1: Use the Webhook (Recommended for Real-Time Updates)

If you've set up webhook notifications, you can get the same data pushed to your server when the payment is captured.

Webhooks can be configured using the following guide.

Sample Webhook Payload: payment.capture

{
  "created": "2025-08-07T02:49:05.587Z",
  "business_id": "YOUR_BUSINESS_ID",
  "event": "payment.capture",
  "api_version": "v3",
  "data": {
    "type": "PAY",
    "status": "SUCCEEDED",
    "country": "ID",
    "created": "2025-08-07T02:49:02.830Z",
    "updated": "2025-08-07T02:49:02.844Z",
    "captures": [
      {
        "capture_id": "cptr-589bd334-99d7-4a4a-8582-57ffd9a1f16b",
        "capture_amount": 115100,
        "capture_timestamp": "2025-08-07T02:49:04.705Z"
      }
    ],
    "currency": "IDR",
    "payment_id": "py-37e924ed-d7eb-4d32-bcb7-111c7863cb22",
    "payment_details": {
      "authorization_data": {
        "reconciliation_id": "7545349437096281603814",
        "authorization_code": "831000",
        "acquirer_merchant_id": "xendit_ctv_agg",
        "network_response_code": "00",
        "network_transaction_id": "016153570198200",
        "retrieval_reference_number": "521802141667",
        "address_verification_result": "M",
        "network_response_code_descriptor": "Approved and completed sucessfully"
      }
    },
    ...
  }
}

Listen to this webhook and extract authorization_data from payment_details.

Option 2: Make Two GET Requests (Polling Method)

Follow these two steps to fetch the authorization details programmatically.

Step 1: Get the Payment Request Details

Make a GET request to:

GET https://api.xendit.co/v3/payment_requests/{payment_request_id}

Replace {payment_request_id} with your actual Payment Request ID (e.g., pr-e44b5974-32c9-4e86-a5ee-6b57683247fc).

Sample Request:

curl -X GET https://api.xendit.co/v3/payment_requests/pr-e44b5974-32c9-4e86-a5ee-6b57683247fc \
  -u your-secret-api-key:

Look for the field:

"latest_payment_id": "py-37e924ed-d7eb-4d32-bcb7-111c7863cb22"

Step 2: Get the Payment Details (Including Authorization Data)

Use the latest_payment_id from the previous step and make a GET request to:

https://api.xendit.co/v3/payments/{latest_payment_id}

Sample Request:

curl -X GET https://api.xendit.co/v3/payments/py-37e924ed-d7eb-4d32-bcb7-111c7863cb22 \
  -u your-secret-api-key:

Where to find the Authorization Data

In the response, authorization-related fields are located under:

"payment_details": {
  "authorization_data": {
    "authorization_code": "...",
    "reconciliation_id": "...",
    "network_transaction_id": "...",
    ...
  }
}
SeoTitle: How to Retrieve Authorization Data for Card Payments

Title: Cara Mengambil Data Otorisasi untuk Pembayaran Kartu
Content:
Untuk mengambil data otorisasi (misalnya, authorization_code, reconciliation_id, network_transaction_id, merchant_advice_code) untuk pembayaran kartu yang dilakukan melalui API v3 kami, Anda memiliki dua opsi:

Opsi 1: Gunakan Webhook (Direkomendasikan untuk Pembaruan Real-Time)

Jika Anda telah mengatur notifikasi webhook, Anda bisa mendapatkan data yang sama dikirim ke server Anda saat pembayaran di-capture.

Webhook dapat dikonfigurasi menggunakan panduan berikut.

Contoh Muatan Webhook: payment.capture

{
  "created": "2025-08-07T02:49:05.587Z",
  "business_id": "YOUR_BUSINESS_ID",
  "event": "payment.capture",
  "api_version": "v3",
  "data": {
    "type": "PAY",
    "status": "SUCCEEDED",
    "country": "ID",
    "created": "2025-08-07T02:49:02.830Z",
    "updated": "2025-08-07T02:49:02.844Z",
    "captures": [
      {
        "capture_id": "cptr-589bd334-99d7-4a4a-8582-57ffd9a1f16b",
        "capture_amount": 115100,
        "capture_timestamp": "2025-08-07T02:49:04.705Z"
      }
    ],
    "currency": "IDR",
    "payment_id": "py-37e924ed-d7eb-4d32-bcb7-111c7863cb22",
    "payment_details": {
      "authorization_data": {
        "reconciliation_id": "7545349437096281603814",
        "authorization_code": "831000",
        "acquirer_merchant_id": "xendit_ctv_agg",
        "network_response_code": "00",
        "network_transaction_id": "016153570198200",
        "retrieval_reference_number": "521802141667",
        "address_verification_result": "M",
        "network_response_code_descriptor": "Approved and completed sucessfully"
      }
    },
    ...
  }
}

Dengarkan webhook ini dan ekstrak authorization_data dari payment_details.

Opsi 2: Lakukan Dua Permintaan GET (Metode Polling)

Ikuti dua langkah ini untuk mengambil detail otorisasi secara terprogram.

Langkah 1: Dapatkan Detail Permintaan Pembayaran

Lakukan permintaan GET ke:

GET https://api.xendit.co/v3/payment_requests/{payment_request_id}

Ganti {payment_request_id} dengan ID Permintaan Pembayaran Anda yang sebenarnya (misalnya, pr-e44b5974-32c9-4e86-a5ee-6b57683247fc).

Contoh Permintaan:

curl -X GET https://api.xendit.co/v3/payment_requests/pr-e44b5974-32c9-4e86-a5ee-6b57683247fc \
  -u your-secret-api-key:

Cari *field*:

"latest_payment_id": "py-37e924ed-d7eb-4d32-bcb7-111c7863cb22"

Langkah 2: Dapatkan Detail Pembayaran (Termasuk Data Otorisasi)

Gunakan latest_payment_id dari langkah sebelumnya dan lakukan permintaan GET ke:

https://api.xendit.co/v3/payments/{latest_payment_id}

Contoh Permintaan:

curl -X GET https://api.xendit.co/v3/payments/py-37e924ed-d7eb-4d32-bcb7-111c7863cb22 \
  -u your-secret-api-key:

Di mana menemukan Data Otorisasi

Dalam respons, *field* terkait otorisasi terletak di bawah:

"payment_details": {
  "authorization_data": {
    "authorization_code": "...",
    "reconciliation_id": "...",
    "network_transaction_id": "...",
    ...
  }
}
SeoTitle: Cara Mengambil Data Otorisasi untuk Pembayaran Kartu

Title: วิธีดึงข้อมูลการอนุมัติสำหรับการชำระเงินด้วยบัตร
Content:
ในการดึงข้อมูลการอนุญาต (authorization data) (เช่น authorization_code, reconciliation_id, network_transaction_id, merchant_advice_code) สำหรับการชำระเงินด้วยบัตรที่ทำผ่าน v3 API ของเรา คุณมี สองทางเลือก:

ทางเลือกที่ 1: ใช้ Webhook (แนะนำสำหรับการอัปเดตแบบเรียลไทม์)

หากคุณได้ตั้งค่าการแจ้งเตือน Webhook ไว้ คุณจะได้รับข้อมูลเดียวกันนี้ส่งไปยังเซิร์ฟเวอร์ของคุณเมื่อมีการจับยอดชำระเงิน (payment is captured)

สามารถกำหนดค่า Webhook ได้โดยใช้ คู่มือต่อไปนี้

ตัวอย่าง Webhook Payload: payment.capture

{
  "created": "2025-08-07T02:49:05.587Z",
  "business_id": "YOUR_BUSINESS_ID",
  "event": "payment.capture",
  "api_version": "v3",
  "data": {
    "type": "PAY",
    "status": "SUCCEEDED",
    "country": "ID",
    "created": "2025-08-07T02:49:02.830Z",
    "updated": "2025-08-07T02:49:02.844Z",
    "captures": [
      {
        "capture_id": "cptr-589bd334-99d7-4a4a-8582-57ffd9a1f16b",
        "capture_amount": 115100,
        "capture_timestamp": "2025-08-07T02:49:04.705Z"
      }
    ],
    "currency": "IDR",
    "payment_id": "py-37e924ed-d7eb-4d32-bcb7-111c7863cb22",
    "payment_details": {
      "authorization_data": {
        "reconciliation_id": "7545349437096281603814",
        "authorization_code": "831000",
        "acquirer_merchant_id": "xendit_ctv_agg",
        "network_response_code": "00",
        "network_transaction_id": "016153570198200",
        "retrieval_reference_number": "521802141667",
        "address_verification_result": "M",
        "network_response_code_descriptor": "Approved and completed sucessfully"
      }
    },
    ...
  }
}

รับฟัง Webhook นี้และดึง authorization_data ออกมาจาก payment_details.

ทางเลือกที่ 2: ทำการร้องขอ GET สองครั้ง (วิธี Polling)

ทำตามสองขั้นตอนเหล่านี้เพื่อดึงรายละเอียดการอนุญาตด้วยโปรแกรม

ขั้นตอนที่ 1: รับรายละเอียด Payment Request

ทำการร้องขอ GET ไปที่:

GET https://api.xendit.co/v3/payment_requests/{payment_request_id}

แทนที่ {payment_request_id} ด้วย Payment Request ID จริงของคุณ (เช่น pr-e44b5974-32c9-4e86-a5ee-6b57683247fc)

ตัวอย่างการร้องขอ (Request):

curl -X GET https://api.xendit.co/v3/payment_requests/pr-e44b5974-32c9-4e86-a5ee-6b57683247fc \
  -u your-secret-api-key:

มองหาฟิลด์:

"latest_payment_id": "py-37e924ed-d7eb-4d32-bcb7-111c7863cb22"

ขั้นตอนที่ 2: รับรายละเอียด Payment (รวมถึง Authorization Data)

ใช้ latest_payment_id จากขั้นตอนก่อนหน้าและทำการร้องขอ GET ไปที่:

https://api.xendit.co/v3/payments/{latest_payment_id}

ตัวอย่างการร้องขอ (Request):

curl -X GET https://api.xendit.co/v3/payments/py-37e924ed-d7eb-4d32-bcb7-111c7863cb22 \
  -u your-secret-api-key:

ตำแหน่งที่พบ Authorization Data

ในการตอบกลับ (response) ฟิลด์ที่เกี่ยวข้องกับการอนุญาตจะอยู่ภายใต้:

"payment_details": {
  "authorization_data": {
    "authorization_code": "...",
    "reconciliation_id": "...",
    "network_transaction_id": "...",
    ...
  }
}
SeoTitle: วิธีดึงข้อมูลการอนุมัติสำหรับการชำระเงินด้วยบัตร

Title: Cómo Obtener Datos de Authorization para Pagos con Tarjeta
Content:
Para obtener datos de autorización (por ejemplo, authorization_code, reconciliation_id, network_transaction_id, merchant_advice_code) para un pago con tarjeta realizado a través de nuestras API v3, usted tiene dos opciones:

Opción 1: Usar el Webhook (Recomendado para Actualizaciones en Tiempo Real)

Si usted ha configurado notificaciones de webhook, puede recibir los mismos datos enviados a su servidor cuando el pago es capturado.

Los webhooks pueden configurarse utilizando la siguiente guía.

Ejemplo de Payload del Webhook: payment.capture

{
  "created": "2025-08-07T02:49:05.587Z",
  "business_id": "YOUR_BUSINESS_ID",
  "event": "payment.capture",
  "api_version": "v3",
  "data": {
    "type": "PAY",
    "status": "SUCCEEDED",
    "country": "ID",
    "created": "2025-08-07T02:49:02.830Z",
    "updated": "2025-08-07T02:49:02.844Z",
    "captures": [
      {
        "capture_id": "cptr-589bd334-99d7-4a4a-8582-57ffd9a1f16b",
        "capture_amount": 115100,
        "capture_timestamp": "2025-08-07T02:49:04.705Z"
      }
    ],
    "currency": "IDR",
    "payment_id": "py-37e924ed-d7eb-4d32-bcb7-111c7863cb22",
    "payment_details": {
      "authorization_data": {
        "reconciliation_id": "7545349437096281603814",
        "authorization_code": "831000",
        "acquirer_merchant_id": "xendit_ctv_agg",
        "network_response_code": "00",
        "network_transaction_id": "016153570198200",
        "retrieval_reference_number": "521802141667",
        "address_verification_result": "M",
        "network_response_code_descriptor": "Approved and completed sucessfully"
      }
    },
    ...
  }
}

Escuche este webhook y extraiga authorization_data de payment_details.

Opción 2: Realizar Dos Solicitudes GET (Método de Polling)

Siga estos dos pasos para obtener los detalles de autorización de forma programática.

Paso 1: Obtener los Detalles de la Solicitud de Pago

Realice una GET request a:

GET https://api.xendit.co/v3/payment_requests/{payment_request_id}

Reemplace {payment_request_id} con su ID de Solicitud de Pago real (por ejemplo, pr-e44b5974-32c9-4e86-a5ee-6b57683247fc).

Ejemplo de Request:

curl -X GET https://api.xendit.co/v3/payment_requests/pr-e44b5974-32c9-4e86-a5ee-6b57683247fc \
  -u your-secret-api-key:

Busque el campo:

"latest_payment_id": "py-37e924ed-d7eb-4d32-bcb7-111c7863cb22"

Paso 2: Obtener los Detalles del Pago (Incluyendo Datos de Autorización)

Utilice el latest_payment_id del paso anterior y realice una GET request a:

https://api.xendit.co/v3/payments/{latest_payment_id}

Ejemplo de Request:

curl -X GET https://api.xendit.co/v3/payments/py-37e924ed-d7eb-4d32-bcb7-111c7863cb22 \
  -u your-secret-api-key:

Dónde encontrar los Datos de Autorización

En el response, los campos relacionados con la autorización se encuentran bajo:

"payment_details": {
  "authorization_data": {
    "authorization_code": "...",
    "reconciliation_id": "...",
    "network_transaction_id": "...",
    ...
  }
}
SeoTitle: Cómo Obtener Datos de Authorization para Pagos con Tarjeta
